speaker: Seeker
text: Subah se dimaag ekdum sunn hai, bas roye ja rahi hoon. Kuch samajh nahi aa raha mere aur mere bacche ka kya hoga. Itna bura lag raha hai ki lagta hai meri koi aukat hi nahi bachi, sab andhera lag raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the raw feeling of overwhelm without digging into the cause yet.
text: Itni takleef ho rahi hai andar, ekdum dimaag ne kaam karna band kar diya hai, aur bas rone ka mann hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, aisa lag raha hai jaise sab khatam ho gaya. Mere bacche ka future ekdum andhere mein dikh raha hai. Main ek maa hoon par bilkul helpless feel kar rahi hoon is waqt.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Softly naming the implied fear about the child's future and the helplessness.
text: Apne bacche ka kal bilkul unsafe aur andhere mein dikh raha hai, aur yahi helplessness sach mein sabse zyada dara rahi hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Kal raat pata chala... Papa ne sari pushtaini zameen bhai ke naam kar di. Bolte hain divorcee beti ka property par kya haq hota hai? Mera dimaag ekdum sunn hai yeh sunkar.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the relational sting of the father's words and actions.
text: Apne hi papa se aisi baat sunna, jahan unhone us haq aur rishte ko bilkul tod diya, yeh waqai mein poori tarah bikhra dene wala hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bhai ka apna parivaar hai, par mera kya? Mujhe toh achanak se ekdum sadak par aane ka darr lag raha hai. Economic precarity itni zyada mehsus ho rahi hai ki lagta hai khana kaise khilaungi bacche ko.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the duty-based focus on providing for the child amid financial fear.
text: Ek akeli maa hone ke naate, aapka poora dhyaan is baat par hai ki bacche ka pet kaise bharega, aur is zimmewari ke beech yeh achanak aaye financial bojh ne aapko fikar mein daal diya hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha, saari raat yahi sochti rahi ki mere bacche ki school fees aur baaki zarooratein kaise poori hongi. Divorce ke baad relatives toh taane maarte hi the, ab khud ke gharwalo ne bhi muh mod liya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Inviting the Seeker to explore the deepest source of pain after multiple restatements.
text: Baaki logo ke taane toh phir bhi kisi tarah jhel liye the, par jab khud ke maa-baap ne aise mooh mod liya, toh is waqt aapka mann andar se kis baat ko lekar sabse zyada ghabra raha hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Ghabrahat is baat ki hai ki main bilkul akeli pad gayi hoon. Mera dimaag ekdum sunn hai, lagta hai meri saari mehnat waste gayi itne saalo ki jo maine is ghar ke liye ki thi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the consequence of the loss of past efforts and the fear of a ruined future.
text: Itne saalo tak jo bhi himmat dikhayi aur qurbani di, aaj woh sab bekaar lag rahi hai, jaise aage badhne ka koi vajood hi na bacha ho...

speaker: Seeker
text: Koi vajood nahi hai. Bhai ke paas pehle hi itna kuch tha, aur papa ne pushtaini zameen se mujhe bilkul bedakhal kar diya kyunki main wapis unke aangan aa gayi hoon. Main unke liye bas ek extra problem ban gayi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the relational displacement from the family home.
text: Jiss aangan ko aapne hamesha apna ghar samjha, wahan aaj aapko apna haq chhodne ko majboor kiya ja raha hai aur sirf ek bojh ki tarah mehsoos karwaya ja raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Bojh hi toh hoon. Ek divorcee aurat hamari society mein bojh hi hoti hai. Mere bache ko mere is status ki wajah se suffer karna padega... and yeh baat mujhe guilt se maar rahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Naming the specific unexpressed emotional state of Quiet Resignation.
text: Lagta hai ki is divorce aur zameen ke faisle ne aapko ek aisi quiet resignation mein daal diya hai, jahan aap bina kisi galti ke khud ko apne hi bache ki nazron mein doshi maan rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan... kyunki main usko ek secure life nahi de pa rahi. Divorce ke waqt socha tha khud kama lungi, par ab legal aur financial dono taraf se phans gayi hoon aur kuch nahi ho pa raha mere se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalizing the systemic issue for daughters in the region while validating her efforts.
text: Humari society mein divorcee betiyon ko property se door karne ki aisi koshish ek kadwa sach hai, par iska matlab yeh bilkul nahi ki aapne as a mother fail kiya hai, aap toh himmat rakh kar akele ladaai lad rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Akele ladna itna aasan nahi hota. Jab apne hi aise waqt pe dhokha de dein, toh sach mein dimaag ekdum sunn ho jata hai. Samajh hi nahi aata kis par bharosa karu.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Brief systemic anecdote normalising the feeling of being silenced due to family pressure.
text: Maa aur beti ke is role mein yeh akelapan bohot common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi khul ke bolega nahi kyunki izzat aur parivaar ke darr se humein chup rehne ko sikhaya jata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Wahi izzat ka toh rona hai! Mummy boli ki court-kachheri ki baat mat karna, biradari mein naak kat jayegi. Mere bache ka future jaye bhaad mein, bas inki jhoothi naak bachi rahe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Stigma cue response: short restatement, ending in pause.
text: Parivaar ki us izzat ke aage aapke aur aapke bache ke haq ko lagatar chhota bataya ja raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Gussa toh bahut hai is choti soch par, par karu kya? Mere paas lawyer karne ke paise thodi na hain, isliye financial pressure sidha meri tabiyat kharab kar raha hai. Main ekdum thak gayi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the exhaustion caused by financial stress layered on duty.
text: Sach mein, is paise aur parivaar ke double pressure ne aapke andar ek aisi thakan bhar di hai jahan ek akeli maa ko aage ka safar bohot akela lag raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sach mein namumkin lagta hai kabhi kabhi. Par mere bache ka chota sa maasoom chehra dekhti hoon toh lagta hai haarna nahi hai. Kuch samajh nahi aa raha aage ka, aap batao ab main kya karoon?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Systemic reframe about her rights to reduce the feeling of having 'no haq'.
text: Pushtaini zameen mein Hindu Succession Act ke tehat ek beti ka bhi poora haq hota hai chahe woh divorcee ho—yeh faisla sirf samaj ka darr hai, kanoon aapke saath hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kanoon ka thoda bahut pata toh hai, par uske paas jau kaise? Paise toh bilkul nahi hain mere paas. Koi aisa raasta hai jahan bina badi fees diye main at least apni ladaai ki shuruwaat kar sakun?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Giving two small, completable steps matching her financial limits.
text: Do choti cheezein hum aaj soch sakte hain: pehla, online free legal aid numbers check karna jahan bina paise diye advice milti hai. Dusra, aapke paas jo bhi documents ya zameen ki copy ho, unhe ikattha karna.

speaker: Seeker
text: Free legal aid ka socha nahi maine pehle. Aur haan, papa ke almari mein zameen ke papers ki ek purani photo-copy rakhi hai, shayad mujhe mil jaye agar main quietly check karun.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Breaking down the document step into a tiny, manageable action for the day.
text: Pehle bas un purane kagazon ko chupchaap ek folder mein jama karke apni safe jagah par rakh lijiye... bas itna hi kijiye aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek hai, folder mein daal lungi un kagazon ko. Par phir bhi andar se ghabrahat ho rahi hai ki kahin bhai ko pata chala toh woh mujhe aaj hi ghar se na nikal de.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Addressing the mild risk flag with normalizing comfort and factual reassurance.
text: Yeh tension aur ghabrahat aana is waqt bilkul normal hai. Par dhyan rakhiye, kanooni taur par aapko achanak koi bedakhal nahi kar sakta, isliye abhi khud ko akela ya kamzor mat maniye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, aise achanak sadak par nikalna aasan nahi hai unke liye bhi. Thodi tasalli mili yeh sunkar. Par subah se dimaag ekdum sunn hai, ab lag raha hai bas let kar aankhein band kar loon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the sheer physical and mental exhaustion after processing heavy emotions.
text: Is poore din ki thakan aur kal raat se chal rahi aisi tension ke baad, sach mein body aur mind dono bahut exhaust ho gaye hain aur unhe aaram ki zaroorat hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Bache ko khana bhi khilana hai abhi. Ek step at a time hi try karungi. Pehle papers ikatthe kar lungi raat mein sote waqt chupchaap.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her courage to act for her child despite the exhaustion.
text: Ek maa ke taur pe aapki himmat aur apne bacche ke haq ke liye yeh ek choti si shuruwaat sach mein kaabil-e-tareef hai, khas kar aise bhari mahol mein.

speaker: Seeker
text: Pata nahi yeh ladaai kitni lambi chalegi, par kam se kam helplessness wala darr thoda kam hua hai aaj. Shukriya meri saari uljhan itne aaram se sunne ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Gentle check-in on immediate well-being before closing.
text: Mujhe khushi hai ki is bhaari time mein bhi thodi himmat ban payi hai. Bas apna dhyaan rakhna aage, kya aapko lagta hai aaj raat thodi der shaanti se so payengi?

speaker: Seeker
text: Koshish toh karungi. Mera bacha bas khel kar abhi meri godh mein aaya hai. Usko apne paas dekh kar thodi aur shanti lag rahi hai. Aaj ka din nikal hi gaya aakhir.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Closing by reflecting the comforting anchor of her child.
text: Apne bache ki us maasoomiyat ko godh mein dekh kar, is poore toofan mein sach mein ek aisi wajah mil hi gayi jo dil ko thoda sukoon de rahi hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Main itni zyada overwhelmed hoon ki bas ek kone mein baithi hoon. Kuch samajh nahi aa raha. Na ghar ka kaam ho raha hai, na bacchon ki taraf dhyan ja raha hai. Flood of emotions itna zyada hai... lag raha hai bas sab khatam ho gaya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the emotional flood without rushing to find the cause.
text: Aisa lag raha hai jaise andar ek toofan chal raha hai, aur is overwhelm mein bacchon aur ghar ka dhyan rakhna bhi aapko bahut bhaari pad raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, bilkul himmat nahi ho rahi uthne ki. Dimag sunn pad gaya hai. Aisa lag raha hai meri saari koshish aur meri izzat sab mitti mein mil gayi. Ek ajeeb si ghutan ho rahi hai andar hi andar.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the implied fear of lost respect and effort to invite deeper sharing.
text: Yeh jo izzat aur koshish ke mitti mein milne wali baat hai, isse lagta hai jaise aapko darr hai ki aapne zindagi mein jo bhi mehnat ki thi, uski ab koi value nahi bachi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Koi value nahi bachi... Aaj Mummy ne aisi baat keh di ki saari umeed toot gayi. Bhai ko business ke liye bada hissa mila, aur jab maine apne haq ki baat ki, toh seedha bol diya 'log kya kahenge'. Ek chhori hui aurat property maangne lage jiska pehle hi sasural ujad gaya hai...

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Highlighting the relational betrayal from the mother regarding the property.
text: Mummy ke in shabdon se bahut gehri chot lagi hai... apno se hi aisi baat sunna ki aapka haq maangna 'log kya kahenge' ka sawal ban gaya, yeh sach mein takleef de raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Wahi toh! Kya mera koi wajood nahi hai? Pehle sasural ujad gaya, wahan se nikali gayi. Ab apne hi ghar mein bojh lagne lagi hoon. Bacchon ka future kaise banaungi is samaj mein, yahi soch ke darr lagta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Probing how she manages this heavy burden of children's future and past trauma.
text: Ye sasural ke ujadne ka dukh aur ab mayke mein apne hi bacchon ke future ko lekar jo dar hai, is bhoj ke sath aap khud ko kaise sambhal rahi hain?

speaker: Seeker
text: Sambhal kahan rahi hoon... bas chal rahi hoon bacchon ki shakal dekh kar. Par andar se ek sharam si aati hai ki main kaisi maa hoon jo unhe ek surakshit jagah bhi nahi de paa rahi. Flood of emotions wapas aa jata hai jab sochu ki aage kya hoga.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Naming the quiet resignation that comes with C3 and Sequential coping.
text: Mujhe lagta hai is puri sthiti mein ek thakawat aur quiet resignation aa gayi hai... jaise itni ladaai ladne ke baad ab himmat toot rahi hai aur sirf bacchon ka chehra dekh kar khud ko aage badha rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi keh rahe ho. Ek ajeeb si shanti aur lachaari hai. Rishtedaron ki nazron mein toh waise hi main ek failure hoon. 'Chhori hui aurat' ka thappa lag gaya hai mere maathe par. Aur ab Mummy ne bhi wahi sawaal utha diya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating the shame and isolation as culturally imposed, not personal failure.
text: Jo akelapan aur sharam aap abhi mehsoos kar rahi hain, wo samajh aati hai. Hamare samaj mein aurat ke akele rehne par izzat ke bojh ko uske hi khilaaf istemaal kiya jata hai, par iska matlab ye nahi ki aapki koshishon mein koi kami thi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Lekin samajh nahi aata ki main galti kahan kar rahi hoon. Main apne aur bacchon ke liye ladna chahti hoon, par kabhi kabhi lagta hai shayad ye meri hi kismat hai. Kabhi kabhi lagta hai sab kuch khatam hi kar doon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Holding phase for safety check due to moderate risk flag.
text: Yeh baatein sunkar ki aapko lag raha hai jaise sab khatam kar dein, mera dil bhaari ho gaya hai. Itni takleef mein aisi bura khayal aana samajh aata hai... Kya tum abhi theek ho aur surakshit ho?

speaker: Seeker
text: Nahi, main waise kuch nahi karungi. Bacchon ko akele thodi chhod sakti hoon. Bas wo bojh itna zyada ho jata hai kabhi kabhi ki seh nahi paati. Main itni zyada overwhelmed hoon aur akelepan se aisi baat nikal gayi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalizing the burden with a brief systemic anecdote after confirming safety.
text: Shukar hai ki aap surakshit hain. Akele bacchon ko palne wali maaon mein yeh bojh aur hopelessness mehsus hona bahut common hai — sirf aapka nahi, lekin koi khul ke bolega nahi kyunki samaj mein izzat ka darr hota hai aur mayke ka support bhi kamzor pad jata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha... yahan koi kisi ka dard nahi samajhta. Sabko bas apni aur khaandan ki 'log kya kahenge' wali chhavi pyaari hai. Meri takleef dikhti hi nahi unhe. Par ab main thak gayi hoon rote rote.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Systemic reframe to show her struggle is structural.
text: Aksar families mein jab ek aurat apne haq ki aawaz uthati hai, toh usey 'log kya kahenge' ka darr dikha kar chup karaya jata hai. Yeh aapki koi aapsi kami nahi, balki ek purani soch ka tarika hai aawaz ko dabane ka.

speaker: Seeker
text: Shayad aap sahi ho. Yeh sirf meri problem nahi, inki soch aisi hai. Par is haqeeqat ke sath aage kaise badhu? Ab kya karoon jisse bacchon ka future aur apna guzaara theek se kar saku? Kuch rasta hai kya?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering small, manageable steps matching her duties.
text: Agar aap tayar hain, toh hum choti shuruat kar sakte hain. Pehla, kya koi ek bharosemand rishtedar ya dost hai jisse aap property ya haq ki baaton par thodi salah le sakein bina turant faisla liye? Dusra, apna ek chota sa alag hisaab likhna shuru kar sakti hain taaki aage ka thoda saaf dikhe.

speaker: Seeker
text: Dost toh jyada nahi bache, sasural ujadne ke baad sabne doori bana li thi. Ek purani saheli hai jo court kacheri me kaam karti hai... shayad usse baat kar sakti hoon. Lekin darr lagta hai baat khul gayi toh Mummy aur gussa karengi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the conflict between seeking help and fear of family backlash.
text: Aapko himmat karni hai apni saheli se baat karne ki, par sath hi yeh darr bhi andar baitha hai ki agar Mummy ko pata chala toh ghar ka mahol aur kharab ho jayega aur bawal badh jayega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, wahi bawal se bachne ke liye main chup rehti hoon. Ek kone mein baith kar rona aasan lagta hai, ladne ke bajaye. Flood of emotions ko control karna mushkil ho jata hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Prompting her to think about small, safe steps.
text: Aapne apni aur bacchon ki shanti chuni hai, isliye itna saha hai. Agar aap chupke se, sirf message par apni saheli se baat karein bina kisi ko bataye, toh kya isse apko thoda safe mehsus hoga?

speaker: Seeker
text: Shayad haan... call pe baat karna safe rahega. Mujhe batao kya karoon, kaise shuru karoon usse baat karna? Kahin woh bhi na soche ki 'chhori hui aurat' hamesha rote hi rehti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Breaking down the suggestion into immediate actionable steps.
text: Pehle aap use bas ek normal message bhejiye, jaise 'Kaise ho? Ek zaroori kaam se baat karni thi, kab free ho?' Phir jab baat ho, toh seedha kanooni salah par na ja kar, bas apne aage ke options samajhne ke liye puchiye... bas itna hi aaj ke liye kariye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ye theek lag raha hai. Bas message bhej dungi pehle. At least usse yeh andaza hoga ki main kuch baat karna chahti hoon. Agar usne support nahi kiya toh? Ye log kya kahenge wali baat dimag se nahi ja rahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalizing the stigma around single mothers and judgment.
text: Logon ka kaam bolna hai, aur khaaskar aurat agar akele bacchon ko paal rahi ho, toh sawaal uthte hi hain. Ye stigma hamare samaj mein deep-rooted hai, ye aapki value nahi batata, balki samaj ki soch dikhata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sach toh yahi hai ki main ek maa hoon, aur mujhe unke liye khade rehna padega. Lekin log hamesha meri galti hi nikalenge. Izzat toh mere haath mein ab bachi nahi, isliye sharam aati hai kisi ko apna dard batane mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Following stigma protocol with a soft, shorter restatement.
text: Yeh samaj ka bojh aur sharam aapko akelepan ki taraf dhakel raha hai, jahan kisi se apna dard baantna bhi ek risk jaisa lagta hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan... par shayad aapke sath baat karke thoda sukoon mila. Mujhe laga tha ki sab mujhe hi galat thehrayenge, jaise meri maa aur bhai ne kiya. Kam se kam yahan toh mujhe lag raha hai ki main failure nahi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reassuring her worth and separating it from her family's judgment.
text: Aap bilkul bhi failure nahi hain. Ek maa ke roop mein bacchon ko akela paalna aur mayke aur sasural dono jagah ki rukaawaton se ladna sach mein bahut badi himmat ka kaam hai, aur aap apne tareeqe se puri koshish kar rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Himmat toh ab jutani padegi, apne liye na sahi, un do chote bacchon ke liye jinka mere alawa koi nahi hai. Maine us saheli ka number nikal liya hai contact list se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting her motivation rooted in her duty as a mother.
text: Ek maa hone ki zimmedari aur bacchon ke aane wale kal ki fikar hi ab aapko agla kadam uthane ki taakat de rahi hai, jo ki bahut aham baat hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan. Aaj hi usko message karungi. Agar kanooni rasta nahi bhi bana, toh kam se kam mujhe apne haq ki jaankari toh hogi. Aur nahi toh, apna chota mota koi kaam shuru karne ka sochungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Giving a quick grounding tool to manage sudden emotional overwhelm in the future.
text: Yeh ek aacha kadam hai. Sath hi, jab bhi kabhi itna overwhelm lage, toh ek paper par sirf apne agle ek ghante ka kaam likhna ya 5 minute ke liye lambi saans lena bhi madad kar sakta hai, taaki bacchon par dhyan wapas laane mein aasaani ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Likhne ka toh pata nahi, par lambi saans lene wali baat main try karungi. Abhi bhi dimag thoda thaka hua lag raha hai, par utni bechaini nahi hai jitni pehle thi jab main aapse baat karne aayi thi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Asking what personal comfort she can draw upon if anxiety rises again.
text: Agar aaj ki tarah fir se wo overwhelming feelings tezi se aane lagein, toh aap apne aas paas ki kis cheez se khud ko shant karna pasand karengi, jisse wo ghutan kam ho sake?

speaker: Seeker
text: Shayad main apne bacchon ke purane bachpan ke photos dekhungi. Unki hasi dekh kar mujhe hamesha thoda honsla milta hai. Bas apni maa hone ki duty poori karni hai, taaki 'log kya kahenge' ki jagah wo mere bacche mujh par garv karein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her grounding method and ending on a warm, culturally resonant note.
text: Ye bahut hi pyaara aur sachcha rasta hai apne aapko ground karne ka. Duniya jo bhi kahe, bacchon ke liye unki maa hi unki sabse badi takat hoti hai, aur aap us safar mein akele nahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag bilkul blank ho chuka hai
text: Dimaag bilkul blank ho chuka hai, main bas ghut rahi hoon andar hi andar. Saans phool rahi hai aur kuch bhi samajh nahi aa raha, bas ek ajeeb sa darr baith gaya hai andar.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the raw overwhelming feeling to validate their state without probing for facts yet.
text: Aisa mehsus ho raha hai jaise sab kuch ekdum se aap par haavi ho gaya hai, aur aage sochne ki koi jagah hi nahi bachi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag bilkul blank ho chuka hai
text: Haan... bas lagta hai zindagi yahin ruk si gayi hai. Ghar mein sab apna mooh pher ke baithe hain. Dimaag bilkul blank ho chuka hai yeh sab dekh kar.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Highlighting the duration and weight of carrying this silence.
text: Yeh ghutan aur apno ki berukhi jhelte hue shayad kafi waqt ho gaya hai, jo ab ek bojh ki tarah bhari lag raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Raat ko ladaai mein Papa ne saaf bol diya ki sasural se wapas aane ke baad maine khandaan ki naak kata di hai. Keh rahe the ab Bhai hi waris hai aur vahi aage property sambhalega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledging the relational sting of the father's words.
text: Apne hi Papa se itni kathor baatein sunna, khaaskar jab aap pehle hi sasural chhutne ki takleef mein ho, andar tak tod dene wala hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bohot jyada... meri asli takleef koi nahi samajh raha yahan. Biradari mein bas izzat ki padi hai inko. Main wahan kya jhel ke aayi hoon, usse kisi ko farq nahi padta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Surfacing the underlying fear of abandonment by her own family.
text: Kahin na kahin yeh darr baith gaya hai ki apna hi parivaar ab aapko khushi se nahi apnayega, sirf samaj aur biradari ke darr se.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag bilkul blank ho chuka hai
text: Bilkul sahi kaha aapne. Mujhe bas apne ghar mein ek chhota sa kona aur shanti chahiye thi. Par ab toh lagta hai main yahan bas ek bojh hoon. Aage ka soch kar dimaag bilkul blank ho chuka hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Naming the specific feeling of quiet resignation tied to Marriage pressure and Sequential coping.
text: Jab aakhri sahara bhi sath chhodta dikhe, toh andar ek ajeeb si chuppi aur majboori aa jati hai... jaise ab kisi se koi umeed hi nahi bachi, bas ek quiet resignation si chha gayi hai aapke andar.

speaker: Seeker
text: Wahi chupchap sabka gussa sehti rehti hoon aajkal. Apne kamre se bahar nikalti hi nahi. Kabhi kabhi lagta hai ki sab kuch chhod chhad ke bas kahin gayab ho jaun.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Handling the mild risk with warm normalisation before validating her worth independently of the family's reaction.
text: Aise khayal aana bohot swabhavik hai jab charo taraf se raste band lagein. Lekin aap apni jagah bilkul theek ho; sasural ki takleefon se wapas aana khud ko bachana hai, isme aapne koi 'naak nahi katai', chahe samaj kuch bhi maanta ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aapki baat sahi hai, par panchayat aur rishtedaar toh aaye din naye taane maarte hain. Papa ka bhi kya dosh, society aur mohalle wale unhe jeene nahi dete honge meri wajah se.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Softly mirroring the stigma cue using a shorter response and a soft pause.
text: Logon ke taane aur unka dabaav aapke Papa par bojh daal raha hai, jo ghoom kar aakhir mein aap par hi nikal raha hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag bilkul blank ho chuka hai
text: Haan, aur is sab mein main kahan jaaun? Dimaag bilkul blank ho chuka hai. Bhai bhi ab seedhe mooh baat nahi karta, use lagta hai main yahan hissa maangne aayi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using a systemic anecdote to normalise her reality and reduce isolation without offering a fix.
text: Hamare yahan aise halat mein, khaaskar jab beti sasural se wapas aati hai, toh ghar walon ka shuru mein aisa hi rukh hota hai — yeh sirf tumhare saath nahi ho raha, par koi is baare mein khul ke bolta nahi kyunki 'khandaan ki izzat' ka sawal hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Toh ab main kya karoon? Mujhe in taanon ke andhere se bahar aana hai. Koi raasta hai kya jisse thodi himmat mile?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering small, manageable suggestions to regain some internal control and peace.
text: Bahar aane ke liye hum chote kadam le sakte hain. Ya toh aap din mein thodi der kisi pass ke mandir ya park mein akele baithne ka niyam bana lo, ya phir apni kisi purani saheli se din mein bas haal-chaal ki baat karna shuru karo bina apni pareshani bataye. Dono hi aapke man ko thodi raahat denge.

speaker: Seeker
text: Mandir jana shayad theek rahega. Ghar ki is bheed aur kalesh se door wahan kam se kam koi taana toh nahi marega mujhe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Breaking down the chosen suggestion into a simple, non-threatening step.
text: Pehle kal subah ka ek samay tay karo jab wahan bheed kam hoti ho… phir wahan jaa kar sirf 10 minute shanti se baitho bina kisi aage ki chinta ke… bas itna hi karna hai kal ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thik hai, subah puja ke waqt chali jaungi mandir. Lekin kya iss ek cheez se mere Papa ka mere prati gussa kam ho payega?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Providing a systemic reframe to clarify that her actions are for her own peace, not for changing ingrained patriarchal structures.
text: Mandir jana sirf aapke apne mann ko shant karne ke liye hai, Papa ke gusse ke liye nahi. Aksar is samaj mein ijjat ke darr aur patriarchy ki wajah se badlav aane mein bohot lamba waqt lagta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Samajhti hoon. Meri tabiyat ka toh aakhir mujhe hi dhyan rakhna padega. Lekin woh property aur waris wali baat soch kar dil bohot dukh jata hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating the hurt of being disinherited due to marital status.
text: Jab itne saalo ka haq aur pyar ek jhatke mein kisi aur ko de diya jaye sirf aapke wapas aane ki wajah se, toh woh dard andar tak chubhta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sach kahu toh mujhe ab unki property ya kisi cheez ka lalach nahi hai. Mujhe bas shanti chahiye, bina in daily ke jhagdo ke.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring her role framing and her simple desire for peace.
text: Ek beti hone ke naate aapne apna pura farz nibhaya, aur ab aapki chahat sirf ek sukoon bhari zindagi ki hai jisme aisi shartein na ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag bilkul blank ho chuka hai
text: Wahi toh baat hai. Main soch rahi thi ki ek baar yeh sab shant ho jaye, toh shayad koi choti-moti job kar loon. Dimaag bilkul blank ho chuka hai abhi toh, lekin baad mein karungi kuch.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her emerging independence and separating her capability from the family's doubts.
text: Aage ke bare mein sochne ki himmat jutana hi apne aap mein bahut badi baat hai is mahol mein. Jab bhi aap aandar se tayar honge, aap apna rasta khud nikal lenge, isme aapki apni mehnat hogi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kaash meri saas aur sasur bhi ye baat samajh paate. Unhone toh seedha bol diya tha ki hamare ghar se ab iski arthi hi niklegi, chahe ghoot ke marr jaye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Exploring the feared consequence left by past emotional abuse.
text: Aise kadve bol sunne ke baad, shayad andar hi andar yeh darr hamesha rehta hoga ki aage chalkar bhi kahin logon ka yahi roop na dekhna pade.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan darr lagta hai. Isliye main aur kisi pe ab bharosa nahi kar sakti. Main akele jeena hi seekhna chahti hoon, bas aur kuch nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring her need for self-protection through isolation.
text: Akelapan ab aapko ek surakshit jagah lagne lagi hai, jahan koi naya rishta aapko dubara waisi chot nahi pahuncha sakega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha aapne. Jab akeli hoti hoon kamre mein, tab woh ghutan thodi kam hoti hai aur saans lene ki jagah milti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Inviting her to envision a safe future since she has stabilized.
text: Agar hum thoda aur aage ka sochein, toh aapke hisaab se shanti wali zindagi sach mein kaisi dikhti hai aapke liye?

speaker: Seeker
text: Bas ek choti si naukri ho jisse apna kharcha nikal jaye, aur kisi ki rok-tok na ho. Roz-roz ke panchayat ke taane na sunne padein mujhe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalising the positive impact of financial independence on mitigating societal pressure.
text: Jab hume apni mehnat se thodi aazadi milti hai, toh samaj aur log kya kehte hain, uska asar aur darr dhire-dhire apne aap kam hone lagta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Koshish karungi main ahista ahista wahan tak pahunchne ki. Ab thoda theek lag raha hai ye sab bol kar, dimaag ki uljhan thodi kam hui hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the shift in her emotional state and validating the relief.
text: Aapke man ka thoda bojh aaj halka hua hai, aur woh apke bolne ke tareeqe mein bhi saaf jhalak raha hai ab.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, main kal subah wahi karungi jo tay hua tha. Mandir jaungi. Uske do-char din baad shanti se online dekhungi kisi kaam ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Praising her courage to take a small step forward while validating her journey.
text: Yeh sunkar bahut accha lag raha hai. Aapne aaj khud ko sambhal kar ek bahut himmat wala kadam uthaya hai apni ek nayi shuruaat ki taraf.

speaker: Seeker
text: Main itni toot chuki hoon ki bas sunn hokar leti hoon, na bhook lag rahi hai na pyaas. Andar ek gehra dard hai jo khatam hi nahi hota. Aisa lag raha hai ki main sabke liye ek bojh ban gayi hoon aur mera is duniya mein koi nahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the emotional overwhelm without pushing for the stressor.
text: Aisa lag raha hai jaise andar sab kuch ekdum khali aur ruka hua sa hai, aur aap us dard aur akelepan mein poori tarah se ghir gayi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, bilkul yahi ho raha hai mere sath. Subah uthne ki himmat hi nahi bachi hai. Bas sunn hokar leti hoon bistar par lagatar. Samajh nahi aata meri zindagi ka maksad kya reh gaya hai ab.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Highlighting the feared consequence of a purposeless future.
text: Aapko aage ka rasta poora andhera aur bematlab lag raha hai, isliye shayad bistar se uthna aur bhi bhari lagne laga hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Rasta bacha hi kahan hai mere liye? Jab wapas mayke aayi toh socha tha thoda sahara milega, par yahan toh papa aur sab bas taane hi marte rehte hain har choti baat par.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Focusing on the relational fracture with the family.
text: Apne ghar walon se, aur khaaskar papa se, jab aisi kadwi baatein sunne ko milti hain, toh dard aur bhi bada ho jata hai kyunki ummeed wahin se thi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha. Papa ne sari registry mere bhai ke naam kar di hai aaj. Unhone seedha bola ki meri shadi mein pehle hi itna dowry diya tha jo ab barbaad ho gaya kyunki mera rishta nahi chala.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the role and duty frame imposed by the father's words.
text: Ek beti hone ke naate, jab aapke astitva aur haq ko sirf us diye gaye dowry aur tute hue rishte ke tarazu mein tola jata hai, toh lagta hai jaise parivar mein aapki koi jagah hi nahi rahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Meri koi aukaat hi nahi bachi is ghar mein ab. Bhai ki biwi alag sunati hai aur papa ke words chubhte hain. Main phirse bas sunn hokar leti hoon aur rone ke alawa kuch nahi kar paati.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Opening up the emotional experience behind the somatic numbness.
text: Jab bhai ki biwi aur papa aise bolte hain, aur aap bilkul khamosh hokar sunn pad jati hain, us waqt aapke man mein kya darr ya khayal chal raha hota hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Us waqt lagta hai ki main sach mein ek kalank hoon. Mera rishta tut gaya toh zaroor mujhme hi kami hogi. Kabhi kabhi lagta hai agar main khatam ho jaaun toh shayad inke paise bach jayenge.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Addressing moderate risk flag safely through restatement and welfare check.
text: Tumhari aisi baatein sunkar ki khud ko mita dene se dusron ki takleef kam hogi, dikhata hai ki dard kitna jyada hai. Yeh sun ke dil bhaari ho gaya. Kya tum abhi theek ho?

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, main abhi safe hoon, bas frustation mein bol diya maine. Main aisa kuch karungi nahi. Par andar jo akelapan hai, wo pal pal mujhe khaye ja raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Confirming safety and returning to emotional overwhelm reflection.
text: Aap physically safe hain yeh jankar thodi chain mili. Par wo jo andar se khokhla karne wala ajeeb sa akelapan hai, usne aapko puri tarah se gher rakha hai is waqt.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bohot jyada gher liya hai mujhe. Main ab samajh gayi hoon ki yahan ek tooti hui shadi wali aurat ki koi izzat nahi hai. Mera koi apna nahi bacha hai ab.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Naming the unexpressed quiet resignation as required by C3+Sequential rule.
text: Lagta hai ek ajeeb si shanti aur chupchaap haar maan lene wali feeling aa gayi hai, jahan aapne khud ko is akelepan aur niyati ke hawale kar diya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aapne theek samjha. Maine andar se ekdum haar maan li hai. Lekin phir bhi pata nahi kyun, thoda darr lagta hai ki kya meri aage ki poori life inhi tano ke beech beetegi?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalising the fear and separating her worth from the failed marriage outcome.
text: Tumhare andar yeh darr hona aur haar jaisa mehsoos karna bilkul normal hai. Hamare samaj mein jab rishta toothta hai toh saari galti aksar aurat par hi daal di jati hai, par iska matlab yeh nahi ki tumhari apni koi value nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Aapki yeh baatein sunkar thoda halka mehsoos ho raha hai. Par samajh nahi aata ki is daldal se bahar aane ke liye main ab kya karoon? Mujhe koi raasta hi nahi dikhai de raha aage.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering small, manageable choices that fit her current low-energy state.
text: Do choti cheezein try kar sakte hain hum. Pehla, jab tano ki aawaz bohot badh jaye, toh sirf 10 minute ke liye kamre se bahar chhat par tahl aao. Dusra, din mein ek baar koi aisa kaam jo tumhe pasand ho jaise silai ya bhajan, usko waqt do. Inme se kya theek lag raha hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Chhat par tahalna shuru kar sakti hoon main. Jab papa kuch bolenge toh main bas chupchap upar chali jaungi. Par kya yeh itna aasan hoga sach mein?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walking through the chosen suggestion step-by-step.
text: Pehle yeh karo, jab bhi tana sunai de, bistar se utho aur dheere dheere seedhiyon se chhat par jao. Wahan jaa kar khuli hawa mein saans lo, phir thodi der aasman dekho… bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek hai, main aasmaan ko dekhne ki koshish zaroor karungi. Kam se kam us band kamre aur ghutan se thoda toh alag hoga. Aaj sham ko hi karke dekhti hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalising the financial decisions as structural, not personal failure.
text: Aksar families mein financial decisions jaise ki registry, ghar ke badon ke control mein hote hain, aur iska tumhari kabiliyat se koi lena dena nahi hai. Yeh ek sadiyon purane system ka hissa hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Mujhe hamesha lagta tha ki main hi galat hoon aur meri hi vajah se dowry waste hua. Isliye khud ko kasoorwar samajhti thi. Aaj pehli baar in sab ko thoda alag nazariye se dekh pa rahi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Using a systemic anecdote to further de-personalise the burden.
text: Gharon mein jahan dowry aur rishte ki baat hoti hai, wahan betiyon ko property ke hak se bahar rakhna ek pattern hai jo bahut common hai — sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolega nahi kyunki samajh ka aapas mein darr hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sacchi? Par jo daag lag gaya hai talaq ka, log toh mujhe hi dosh dete hain. Aas pados aur rishtedaron ke taane zeher lagte hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Handling stigma cue softly through brief restatement with a pause.
text: Logon ke un kadwe bolon ne aur is daag wale tag ne tumhe andar se bohot akela kar diya hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan thoda time zaroor lagega accept karne mein, par ab mujhe unke tano mein apni galti nahi, balki samaj ki chhoti soch dikhti hai. Main ab poora din us bistar par ghut-ghut ke nahi rahungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating the shift in perspective and praising her strength.
text: Tumhara yeh naya nazariya dekh kar sach mein bahut acha lag raha hai. Jis tarah tum khud ko is guilt aur dusron ke diye taano se alag kar rahi ho, wo tumhari bohot badi strength hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Main ghar par baithe-baithe kuch chote online silai ya buanai ke order lene ka soch rahi hoon. Taki main puri tarah economically dependent na rahun bhai par.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the new role frame of self-dependence.
text: Apne pairo par khade hone ka aur khud ki mehnat se paise kamane ka yeh idea tumhe ek nayi aur majboot pehchan dega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Ji bilkul, shuruaat mein log aur baatein banayenge, thoda mushkil bhi hoga. Par main koshish pakhhi karungi. Aapne meri bahut madad ki hai aaj meri aakhein kholne mein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Re-inforcing the systemic value of financial independence.
text: Financial independence ek aisi cheez hai jo hamari society ke is purane structure mein auraton ko apni aawaz deti hai. Yeh aapke aatm vishwas ke liye bohot solid kadam hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi keh rahe hain. Agar mere paas thodi bhi saving ya hunar hota toh pehle din se yeh nobat nahi aati. Par chalo, der aaye durust aaye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting on the temporal aspect of learning from the past.
text: Us bura waqt jo guzar gaya, usne lambe samay tak takleef toh di, par aage ki zindagi ke liye ek bohot bada aur keemti sabaq sikha diya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, abhi bhi dard toh poori tarah nahi gaya hai, par kam se kam mujhe ek nayi disha mil gayi hai aaj. Ab mujhe pata hai thoda-thoda karke aage badhna hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the reduced feared consequence.
text: Wo dar ki zindagi ab hamesha taano aur andhere mein hi jayegi, wo ab kam ho raha hai kyunki tumne umeed ka raasta khud bana liya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Dil se bohot shukriya. Main aaj shaam se hi chhat par jaya karungi. Itne lamba time kisi ne meri takleef ko bina judge kiye dhyan se nahi suna tha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ending with warm relational reflection of her progress.
text: Aapne khud ko bharosa karke open up kiya aur ek naye safar ki himmat jutayi, yeh poori tarah se aapki hi taqat hai. Apna aage bhi aise hi khayal rakhna.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bed se uthne ki himmat nahi ho rahi
text: Mera dil itni buri tarah toot gaya hai ki bed se uthne ki himmat nahi ho rahi, dimaag mein bas pata nahi kyun wahi taane goonj rahe hain. Main poori tarah ek ajeeb si emotional flooding ka shikar hoon, samajh hi nahi aa raha kya karoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the emotional overwhelm without pushing for the stressor content yet.
text: Baaton se mehsoos ho raha hai ki andar ek bohot bada toofan chal raha hai jismein sach mein bed se uthne ki himmat nahi ho rahi aur wahi bura ehsaas baar baar ghoom raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bed se uthne ki himmat nahi ho rahi
text: Haan, bilkul. Aisa lag raha hai jaise sab khatam ho gaya hai aur meri saari himmat toot gayi hai. Mujhe baar baar apne bache ka chehra dekh kar rona aa raha hai ki aage kya hoga uski zindagi ka, aur yehi bojh mujhe bed se uthne ki himmat nahi de raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Highlighting the implied fear for the child's future.
text: Yeh darr bohot gehra lag raha hai ki is saari thakan aur toote hue halat ka asar seedha aapke bache ke aane wale kal par pad sakta hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bed se uthne ki himmat nahi ho rahi
text: Kal raat ki bahas ke baad Bhai ne saaf keh diya ki ab mera is ghar par koi haq nahi kyunki mera divorce ho chuka hai aur usne mujhe 'manhoos' kaha. Isi taane ki wajah se aaj bed se uthne ki himmat nahi ho rahi meri.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Handling stigma cue by using a shorter restatement ending in a soft pause.
text: Bhai ka haq chheen lena aur aise chubhne wale 'manhoos' jaise shabd kehna, ek akeli maa ke liye sach mein bahut dardnak hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bed se uthne ki himmat nahi ho rahi
text: Dardnak se zyada yeh guilt hai ki main kya sach mein manhoos hoon apne bacche ke liye? Mujhe samajh nahi aa raha ki is economic precarity mein ab mera aur mere bache ka kya wajood bacha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflecting the duration and weight of the ongoing self-doubt.
text: Is halat mein jab har waqt paise aur sahare ka darr bana ho, toh gujri raat ke wo shabd ab tak ek bojh ban kar aapse aapke wajood par hi sawaal karwa rahe hain.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bed se uthne ki himmat nahi ho rahi
text: Na mera apna koi ghar hai aur na savings. Akeli aurat kya karegi aisi sthiti mein jahan biradari ka pressure alag hota hai?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Exploring the heaviest burden keeping the seeker paralyzed, as restatements naturally paused.
text: Zimmedari ka bojh aur is biradari mein akelepan ka ehsaas bahut bada hai. Is waqt aapke hisaab se kaun si fikar aapko bed se uthne ki himmat nahi de rahi hai?

speaker: Seeker
text: Yahi ki aage kaise palungi apne bache ko. Bhai ne clear kar diya ki apne paas nahi rakhega mujhe. Meri koi aukaat nahi rahi yahan ek divorced aurat bankar.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the role and duty frame of a mother vs the stigma.
text: Ek taraf bacche ko paalne ki itni badi maa wali duty hai, aur doosri taraf biradari ka dabaav jahan aukaat aur divorce ke taane sehnne pad rahe hain...

speaker: Seeker
text: Bilkul. Maine jo kuch kiya sirf usko ek achhi zindagi dene ke liye kiya. Lekin ab samajh nahi aata ki meri pehchaan kya hai? Bas ek taane sunne wali aurat jo sab par bojh hai?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the relational conflict that makes her question her identity.
text: Apne bacche ke liye sab kuch tyag karne ke baad bhi, jab apno se aur ghar walo se wahi bojh aur taane milti hain, toh khud ki pehchaan par sawaal uthna laazmi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan... ek ajeeb si thakan hai ab in sab se. Kuch bolne ka mann nahi karta. Lagta hai chupchap sab taane seh loon kyunki is economic haalat mein kahan jaungi isko lekar.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Naming the specific unexpressed emotion (Quiet Resignation) for C3+Sequential.
text: Lagta hai in sab pareshaniyon se ladte ladte ek ajeeb si 'quiet resignation' ya chuppi aa gayi hai, jahan thak kar yehi ek raasta dikh raha hai ki bas sab chupchap bardaasht kar liya jaaye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha. Chuppi hi aakhiri sahara lagta hai aisi sthiti mein. Jab bhai ne haq chheena toh maine ek shabd nahi kaha. Bas sun liya apne bache ki khaatir. Par kya zindagi bhar yahi chalega?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating the cultural reality of mothers prioritizing children and separating her worth from the brother's actions.
text: Ek maa hone ke naate bache ki suraksha ke liye us waqt chup rehna ek bilkul natural aur normal reaction hai, khaaskar humari biradari ke mahol mein. Lekin kisi ka aapka haq chheenna unki chhoti soch dikhata hai, aapki ek maa aur aurat ke roop mein aukaat ya kimat ko kam nahi karta.

speaker: Seeker
text: Shayad aap theek keh rahe hain. Par akeli maa ki kimat yahan sach mein koi nahi samajhta. Sab sochte hain ki iska divorce ho gaya, ab ye kisi kaam ki nahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Providing a brief systemic anecdote specific to the seeker's world to normalize the stigma experience.
text: Aksar dekha hai maine, humare samaj mein aisi hi soch bani hui hai jahan ek divorced aurat aur akeli maa ko bojh ki nazar se dekhte hain — sirf tumhare sath nahi ho raha, lekin koi aurat khul kar bolega nahi kyunki biradari ke taano ka darr hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, dusri aurton ko bhi aise taane sunne padte honge. Mujhe un manhoos baaton se bahar nikalna hai ab. Mera baccha meri wajah se udaas hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Highlighting the emerging readiness and emotional shift towards action.
text: In taano ko peeche chhodne ki aur apne bache ke liye wapas ek ummeed dhoondhne ki chahat ab aapki baaton mein saaf jhalak rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, main theek hona chahti hoon apne bete ke liye. Main nahi chahti ki wo mujhe bed par padi aur roti hui dekhe. Par samajh nahi aa raha aage ka, abhi batao kya karoon main is thakan ke sath?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offering small, <10 min completable actions matching her exhausted persona and existing duties.
text: Aise waqt mein jab rasta poora dhundhla ho, toh bohot choti shuruaat karni chahiye. Kya abhi sirf apne bache ko paas bithakar thoda pani pee sakti hain, ya phir bas uska haath tham kar do minute shanti se baith sakti hain? Jo asaan lage chuniye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Paani peena aur bache ka haath thamna shayad main kar paungi. Likhoongi ya zyada sochungi toh phir wahi rona shuru ho jayega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walking through one small step to break the overwhelm.
text: Sahi faisla hai. Pehle yeh karo… bed par thoda seedhe baith kar ghunt ghunt pani piyo… phir bache ka haath apne haath mein lo… bas itna hi aaj ke liye. Koi aur khayal nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Maine haath tham liya hai uska. Thoda sa shant lag raha hai mujhe uski soti hui aankhein dekh kar. Andar ki ghabrahat thodi kam hui hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Systemically reframing the stigma of divorce using the seeker's vocabulary.
text: Apne bacche ko kareeb rakhne se hi bohot taqat milti hai. Yeh hamesha yaad rakhna ki divorce kisi aurat ka 'manhoos' hona nahi dikhata, balki ye humari biradari ki banawat aisi hai jo aurat ka haq marna janti hai aur saara dosh us par daal deti hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, aap sahi keh rahe hain. Ye samaj ki soch hi aisi hai jisne usko sikhaya hai ki aurat ka haq kaise chheente hain. Mere bhai ne bhi society ko hi dekha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring the relational sting of the brother echoing society.
text: Aur jab apna hi saga bhai biradari walon ki tarah sochne lage aur support karne ki bajaye haq chheen le, toh dard doguna mahsoos hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Doguna hota hai zaroor, par ab aur nahi ro-ungi uski baaton par. Agar usey meri aur mere bacche ki kadar nahi, toh main khud se sahara banungi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating her maternal strength and resilience against the taunts.
text: Aapki yeh himmat waqai bahut hausle wali hai. Taano ke beech khud ko sahara banana aur apne bacche ke sahare aage ka sochna... ye ek maa ki bahut sachi aur badi takat hoti hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Himmat toh jutani hi padegi aakhir. Kal se main soch rahi hoon ki koi bhi chota mota kaam dhoondhne ki koshish karoon. Kam se kam thoda paisa aaye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Giving achievable, low-barrier next steps for her job-seeking intent.
text: Kaam dhoondhne ka khayal bahut badhiya aur practical hai. Kya kal subah ek baar dhyan se apni pehchan aur padhai ke documents ek jagah jama karke file mein rakh lengi, ya phone par aas paas ki opportunity search karengi? Sirf ek chota kadam.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: bed se uthne ki himmat nahi ho rahi
text: Main documents wali file jama kar lungi pehle. Ye kaam asaan hai. Mujhe lag raha tha ki phir se wahi taane yaad aayenge aur bed se uthne ki himmat nahi hogi, par ab aisa nahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirroring her maternal duty driving the execution of her plan.
text: Apni ek nayi zindagi aur maa hone ki zimmedari nibhane ki shuruaat aap us documents jama karne ke chote se kadam se hi kar rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan bilkul. Zindagi itni jaldi khatam nahi hoti, bhale hi abhi rasta kaafi lamba aur asaan na lag raha ho. Main ab thoda uth rahi hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Highlighting the emerging sense of hope and regained strength.
text: Ab aapke andar ek nayi himmat jag rahi hai jahan us toote hue ehsaas ke beech se hi apne wajood ke liye ek aasha ki kiran saaf jhalak rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Shukriya sunne ke liye. Yeh baatein andar hi dab gayi thi toh meri himmat aur bhi toot rahi thi. Ab uthkar main apne bete ke liye paani laati hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validating the seeker's positive progress and ending warmly.
text: Maa ki takat sach mein behtareen hoti hai. Apne andar se ye hausla nikalna aur uth kar bete ka khayal rakhne jana, is baat ka bahut bada saboot hai ki aap in halat se upar uth sakti hain.
